copyPrinciples: do not hide stricter shared degraded truth

examples.heading: We need to reopen this from the NHS App
examples.body: This page has lost the secure NHS App context. Go back to the NHS App and open the service again.
examples.assistiveAnnouncement: The secure NHS App context is missing.

examples.heading: We could not confirm your sign in
examples.body: Your NHS App sign in could not be safely linked to this service. Try again from the NHS App.
examples.primaryAction: Try again from the NHS App
examples.assistiveAnnouncement: Your NHS App sign in could not be confirmed.

examples.heading: This link has expired
examples.body: For your security, open the service again from the NHS App to get the latest page.

examples.heading: Your session has ended
examples.body: To keep your information safe, sign in again from the NHS App before continuing.

examples.heading: This action cannot be completed in the NHS App right now
examples.body: You can use the safe browser handoff if it is available, or return to the service summary.
examples.assistiveAnnouncement: This action is not available in the NHS App webview.

examples.heading: The file is not available in the NHS App
examples.body: We will show the safe summary here. If the full file is needed, use the secure send later option when it is shown.
examples.assistiveAnnouncement: The file is not available in the NHS App.

examples.heading: This NHS App action is not supported
examples.body: The service will keep your summary available and show another safe way to continue if one is available.
examples.assistiveAnnouncement: This action is not supported in the NHS App.

examples.heading: This NHS App service is temporarily limited
examples.body: You can still see the latest safe summary where one is available. Some actions are paused while we check the service.
examples.assistiveAnnouncement: This NHS App route is temporarily limited.

examples.heading: This NHS App service is paused
examples.body: We cannot safely monitor this route right now, so actions are paused and the safe summary remains available where possible.
examples.assistiveAnnouncement: This NHS App route is paused because service monitoring is unavailable.
